# ADR-NNNN: <Decision title>

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by ADR-NNNN | Deprecated
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** CTO
- **Tags:** <area: frontend | backend | data | infra | security | ai | design | process>

## Problem

What decision needs to be made and why now? What forces are in play (product
requirements, scale targets, team constraints, cost)?

## Alternatives considered

For each realistic alternative:

### Option A — <name>

- Summary
- Strengths
- Weaknesses
- Evidence (docs, benchmarks, production reports — link sources)

### Option B — <name>

…

## Research

Key facts gathered before deciding, with links. Prefer official documentation
over blog posts. Note version numbers and dates — research goes stale.

## Decision

The chosen option, stated in one sentence, then the reasoning.

## Why this option

The decisive factors, in priority order.

## Trade-offs accepted

What we knowingly give up, and why that is acceptable at our stage.

## Future impact

- What this makes easier later
- What this makes harder later
- The trigger conditions under which this decision should be revisited
